commit.subject: LU-10455 kernel: Test Only Revert kernel update RHEL7.4
commit.message:
LU-10455 kernel: Test Only Revert kernel update RHEL7.4

Revert the update of RHEL 7.4 kernel to 3.10.0-693.11.6.el7.

We want to test the performance impact of updating the kernel
and need a version of 2.10.3 RC1 without this update. This
patch if for test only.
